pkgutil/extend_path.name: extend_path
pkgutil/extend_path.description: Extend the search path for the modules which comprise a package. Intended use is to place the following code in a package’s __init__.py: from pkgutil import extend_path __path__ = extend_path(__path__, __name__) For each directory on sys.path that has a subdirectory that matches the package name, add the subdirectory to the package’s __path__. This is useful if one wants to distribute different parts of a single logical package as multiple directories. It also looks for *.pkg files beginning ...
